authored.para: This instruction calculates an address from a base register value and an immediate offset, loads two 32-bit words or two 64-bit doublewords from memory, and writes them to two registers. For information about addressing modes, see Load/Store addressing modes.

encodingnotes.para: For information about the CONSTRAINED UNPREDICTABLE behavior of this instruction, see Architectural Constraints on UNPREDICTABLE behaviors, and particularly LDP.

operationalnote_content.para: This instruction is a data-independent-time instruction as described in About PSTATE.DIT.

a.hover: Is the 32-bit name of the first general-purpose register to be transferred, encoded in the "Rt" field.
Is the 32-bit name of the second general-purpose register to be transferred, encoded in the "Rt2" field.
Is the 64-bit name of the general-purpose base register or stack pointer, encoded in the "Rn" field.
For the "Post-index 32-bit" and "Pre-index 32-bit" variants: is the signed immediate byte offset, a multiple of 4 in the range -256 to 252, encoded in the "imm7" field as <imm>/4.
Is the 64-bit name of the first general-purpose register to be transferred, encoded in the "Rt" field.
Is the 64-bit name of the second general-purpose register to be transferred, encoded in the "Rt2" field.
Is the 64-bit name of the general-purpose base register or stack pointer, encoded in the "Rn" field.
For the "Post-index 64-bit" and "Pre-index 64-bit" variants: is the signed immediate byte offset, a multiple of 8 in the range -512 to 504, encoded in the "imm7" field as <imm>/8.

ps.name: A64.ldst.ldstpair_post.LDP_32_ldstpair_post
ps.pstext: var wback : boolean = TRUE; let postindex : boolean = TRUE;

a.hover: Is the 32-bit name of the first general-purpose register to be transferred, encoded in the "Rt" field.
Is the 32-bit name of the second general-purpose register to be transferred, encoded in the "Rt2" field.
Is the 64-bit name of the general-purpose base register or stack pointer, encoded in the "Rn" field.
For the "Post-index 32-bit" and "Pre-index 32-bit" variants: is the signed immediate byte offset, a multiple of 4 in the range -256 to 252, encoded in the "imm7" field as <imm>/4.
Is the 64-bit name of the first general-purpose register to be transferred, encoded in the "Rt" field.
Is the 64-bit name of the second general-purpose register to be transferred, encoded in the "Rt2" field.
Is the 64-bit name of the general-purpose base register or stack pointer, encoded in the "Rn" field.
For the "Post-index 64-bit" and "Pre-index 64-bit" variants: is the signed immediate byte offset, a multiple of 8 in the range -512 to 504, encoded in the "imm7" field as <imm>/8.

ps.name: A64.ldst.ldstpair_pre.LDP_32_ldstpair_pre
ps.pstext: var wback : boolean = TRUE; let postindex : boolean = FALSE;

a.hover: Is the 32-bit name of the first general-purpose register to be transferred, encoded in the "Rt" field.
Is the 32-bit name of the second general-purpose register to be transferred, encoded in the "Rt2" field.
Is the 64-bit name of the general-purpose base register or stack pointer, encoded in the "Rn" field.
For the "Signed offset 32-bit" variant: is the optional signed immediate byte offset, a multiple of 4 in the range -256 to 252, defaulting to 0 and encoded in the "imm7" field as <imm>/4.
Is the 64-bit name of the first general-purpose register to be transferred, encoded in the "Rt" field.
Is the 64-bit name of the second general-purpose register to be transferred, encoded in the "Rt2" field.
Is the 64-bit name of the general-purpose base register or stack pointer, encoded in the "Rn" field.
For the "Signed offset 64-bit" variant: is the optional signed immediate byte offset, a multiple of 8 in the range -512 to 504, defaulting to 0 and encoded in the "imm7" field as <imm>/8.

ps.name: A64.ldst.ldstpair_off.LDP_32_ldstpair_off
ps.pstext: var wback : boolean = FALSE; let postindex : boolean = FALSE;

intro.para: Is the 32-bit name of the first general-purpose register to be transferred, encoded in the "Rt" field.
Is the 32-bit name of the second general-purpose register to be transferred, encoded in the "Rt2" field.

explanation.enclist: LDP_32_ldstpair_post, LDP_64_ldstpair_post, LDP_32_ldstpair_pre, LDP_64_ldstpair_pre, LDP_32_ldstpair_off, LDP_64_ldstpair_off

intro.para: Is the 64-bit name of the general-purpose base register or stack pointer, encoded in the "Rn" field.
For the "Post-index 32-bit" and "Pre-index 32-bit" variants: is the signed immediate byte offset, a multiple of 4 in the range -256 to 252, encoded in the "imm7" field as <imm>/4.
For the "Post-index 64-bit" and "Pre-index 64-bit" variants: is the signed immediate byte offset, a multiple of 8 in the range -512 to 504, encoded in the "imm7" field as <imm>/8.
For the "Signed offset 32-bit" variant: is the optional signed immediate byte offset, a multiple of 4 in the range -256 to 252, defaulting to 0 and encoded in the "imm7" field as <imm>/4.
For the "Signed offset 64-bit" variant: is the optional signed immediate byte offset, a multiple of 8 in the range -512 to 504, defaulting to 0 and encoded in the "imm7" field as <imm>/8.
Is the 64-bit name of the first general-purpose register to be transferred, encoded in the "Rt" field.
Is the 64-bit name of the second general-purpose register to be transferred, encoded in the "Rt2" field.

ps.name: A64.ldst.ldstpair_post.LDP_32_ldstpair_post
A64.ldst.ldstpair_post.LDP_32_ldstpair_post
